calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Continued To Apr-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jonathan Ayers, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company LLC dba Land Rover Capital Group.
Diana Shiba, Financial Services Specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Ritu Raj.
Default was entered against defendant on December 11, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 11, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company LLC, dba Land Rover Capital Group, and against the Defaulted Defendant Ritu Raj as follows:

Damages/Principal - $57,632.01.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,026.34.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $480.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $63,138.35.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company LLC dba Land Rover Capital Group is awarded possession of and shall recover from defendant Ritu Raj the vehicle described as a black 2008 Land Rover Range Rover Sport.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Ntc Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing And Application For Writ Of Possession
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES.

Plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company's Application For Writ Of Possession: no proof of service of notice of application for writ of possession on file off calendar. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. Not reported. (610/PS)
